mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fortune_tree_attempt ( uuid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL, cycle_id VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL, used_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, level INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, deposit INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, reward_max INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, seed BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, bubble_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, reroll_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_millis BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, collect_bits TEXT, updated_at_millis BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (uuid, cycle_id) )
mapper.select: SELECT uuid, cycle_id AS cycleId, status, used_count AS usedCount, level, deposit, reward_max AS rewardMax, seed, bubble_count AS bubbleCount, reroll_count AS rerollCount, created_at_millis AS createdAtMillis, collect_bits AS collectBits, updated_at_millis AS updatedAtMillis FROM fortune_tree_attempt WHERE uuid = #{uuid} AND cycle_id = #{cycleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE fortune_tree_attempt SET status = #{status}, used_count = #{usedCount}, level = #{level}, deposit = #{deposit}, reward_max = #{rewardMax}, seed = #{seed}, bubble_count = #{bubbleCount}, reroll_count = #{rerollCount}, created_at_millis = #{createdAtMillis}, collect_bits = #{collectBits}, updated_at_millis = #{updatedAtMillis} WHERE uuid = #{uuid} AND cycle_id = #{cycleId}
